option.name: originalContent
option.value:
[project] name = "code-review-agent" version = "0.1.0" description = "Add your description here" readme = "README.md" authors = [ { name = "kuju63", email = "lh182051+src@gmail.com" } ] requires-python = ">=3.12" dependencies = [ "fastapi>=0.136.3", "pydantic>=2.13.4", "strands-agents[openai]>=1.41.0", "uvicorn[standard]>=0.48.0", ]
[project.scripts] code-review-agent = "code_review_agent:main"
[build-system] requires = ["uv_build>=0.11.8,<0.12.0"] build-backend = "uv_build"
[tool.pyright] venvPath = "." venv = ".venv"
[dependency-groups] dev = [ "pre-commit>=4.6.0", "pyright>=1.1.409", "pytest>=9.0.3", "pytest-cov>=7.1.0", "ruff>=0.15.15", ]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
[project] name = "code-review-agent" version = "0.1.0" description = "Add your description here" readme = "README.md" authors = [ { name = "kuju63", email = "lh182051+src@gmail.com" } ] requires-python = ">=3.12" dependencies = [ "fastapi>=0.136.3", "httpx>=0.28", "pydantic>=2.13.4", "pydantic-settings>=2.0", "python-dotenv>=1.0", "strands-agents[openai]>=1.41.0", "uvicorn[standard]>=0.48.0", ]
[project.scripts] code-review-agent = "code_review_agent:main"
[build-system] requires = ["uv_build>=0.11.8,<0.12.0"] build-backend = "uv_build"
[tool.pyright] venvPath = "." venv = ".venv"
[tool.pytest.ini_options] asyncio_mode = "strict"
[dependency-groups] dev = [ "pre-commit>=4.6.0", "pyright>=1.1.409", "pytest>=9.0.3", "pytest-asyncio>=0.26", "pytest-cov>=7.1.0", "ruff>=0.15.15", ]
